text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hmm... That wasn't the best, was it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Maruzensky sighs at the sight of her time.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Maybe I've been a little overzealous lately?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
If I want to get faster, I might need to do a little
personal maintenance...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I should take a drive on the highway to
refresh myself. It's been a while.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky seems to be getting tired—perhaps
from running too many consecutive races. I should
review her race schedule...
